verses.text: Tua ciangin Solomon in Jerusalem sung Moriah Mual tung, a pa David' tungah Topa a kilahna mun, David in a sehnasa mun ahi, Jebus mi Ornan' ancilna phualah Topa' biakinn lam ding kipan hi
Amah in ama uk a kum lina a kha nihna sungin lam ding kipan hi
Pasian' biakinn lamna ding Solomon' geelna hih bang ahi hi: A dung pi sawmkua hi a, a vai pi sawmthum ahi hi
Inn mai-a innliim pen inn vai tawh kikimin pi sawmthum sau a, a san'na zong pi sawmthum mah ahi hi
Amah in taaksan tawh innpi kawm dapin kham hoih tawh zut a, tua tungah nisuh leh khainiang a bawl hi
Amah in suangmanpha phutin a inn zem hi. A kham zatte Parvaim kham ahi hi
Tua ahih ciangin amah in a inn, a innsunte, a sangkilte, a kawmte, leh a kongkhakte kham tawh zut a, tua ciangin a kawmte tungah kherub-te a bawl hi
Tua ciangin amah in siangtho pen mun bawl hi. A dung pen a vai tawh kizui-in pi sawmthum hi a, a vai zong pi sawmthum mah ahi hi. Amah in kham hoih talen zaguk tawh a zut hi
A kilhnate a gihna kham shekel sawmnga ahi hi. Tua ciangin amah in a inn dawl tungnungte kham tawh a zut hi
Amah in siangtho pen mun sungah sing kherub nih bawlin kham tawh tuate zut hi
Tua kherub-te gel' kha a kizalin pi sawmthum ahi hi. A khat' kha pen pi sagih leh alang hi-in inn kawm ban a, tua ciangin alang khat pi sagih leh alang in a kherub dang khat' kha ban hi
Tua mah bangin a kherub dang khat' kha langkhat zong pi sagih leh alang hi-in inn kawm langkhat ban a, pi sagih leh alang mah a sau a kha langkhat pen a kherub masa' kha tawh kizom hi
Hih kherub-te' khate in pi sawmthum huam hi. Kherub-te amau' khe-in dingin innpi sunglam nga uh hi
Tua ciangin amah in a dum, a ausan, leh a dupsan puante, leh saihadial puan tawh a dalna puan bawl a, tua tungah kherub-te a bawl hi.
Amah in inn mai sanah pi sawmnga leh pi nih leh alang a sang, a dawn tuakah pi sagih leh alang a pha khuamluzepna a nei khuampi nih bawl hi
Amah in ngawnga awhte bangin khainiangte bawlin khuampite dawnah khai hi. Tua ciangin amah in mang kawlsing za khat bawlin khainiangte tungah koih hi
Amah in tua khuamte, khat leitaw lam, a khat leilu lam, biakinn mai-ah phut hi. Amah in leitaw lama om pen Jakhin phuakin, leilu lama om pen Boaz a phuak hi.
